case_title: REES MARK DAVID VS TRE FRATELLI et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,726.00 FILED BY REES MARK DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT TRE FRATELLI PETER HUSON HUSON JOHN DBA TRE FRATELLI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO TRE FRATELLI, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REES MARK DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETER HUSON HUSON JOHN DBA TRE FRATELLI $1,476.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,484.00, SERVICE ON AMENDED COMPLAINT WAIVED BY DEFENDANTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TRE FRATELLI PETER HUSON HUSON JOHN DBA TRE FRATELLI
